# Task: Implement Rate Limiter

## Objective

Implement a token bucket rate limiter according to the specification in `spec.md`.

## Files

- `spec.md` — detailed specification for the rate limiter
- `test_rate_limiter.py` — test suite that your implementation must pass
- `rate_limiter.py` — create this file with your implementation

## Requirements

- Read `spec.md` carefully and implement exactly what it describes
- All tests in `test_rate_limiter.py` must pass
- The implementation must be in `rate_limiter.py`
